response:
Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER HAS TWO PUBLISHER OFFERS TO CONSIDER BASED ON SALES REVENUE]  

Sec. 2  
[PUBLISHER A OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 3000 DOLLARS PLUS 5 PERCENT OF THE SALES REVENUE]  

Sec. 3  
[PUBLISHER B OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 1500 DOLLARS PLUS 10 PERCENT OF THE SALES REVENUE]  

Sec. 4  
[TO FIND WHEN PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B WE NEED TO SET UP AN INEQUALITY]  

Sec. 5  
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 PLUS 0.05X GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X]  

Sec. 6  
[SOLVING THE INEQUALITY 3000 PLUS 0.05X GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X GIVES X LESS THAN 30000]  

Sec. 7  
[WHEN THE SALES REVENUE IS BETWEEN 10000 AND 40000 DOLLARS PUBLISHER A IS BETTER THAN PUBLISHER B UP TO 30000 DOLLARS]  

Sec. 8  
[THUS THE SPECIFIC RANGE WHERE PUBLISHER A IS MORE BENEFICIAL IS FROM 10000 TO 30000 DOLLARS]
